title: TRANSITIONS - 211info
text: TRANSITIONS TRANSITIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides non-clinical case management services that focus on identifying areas requiring support, and helping individuals navigate and access available community resources. 2611 NE Courtney Drive Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Individuals with a serious health condition and a limited life expectancy Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 322-1289 .. Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 322-1289 Bethany Benefield [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website, call, or email for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Deschutes County and zip codes 97730, 97734, 97741, 97759, 97760, 97753, 97754, 97756, 97731, 97733, 97737, 97739, 97638, 97641, and 97735. Services: Case/Care Management * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Case/Care Management * Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
